_readme.description: TradingView вЖТ Telegram alert message templates.
how_to_add_a_template: 1. Add a new key at the top level (e.g. 'BTC_long').
2. Give it an 'emoji' field (optional but helpful).
4. Any field sent in your TradingView JSON payload can be a {{variable}}.
5. Missing variables are replaced with an empty string вАФ no crashes.
6. The 'default' template is used when no matching template is found.
7. Restart the server after editing this file (or it uses the cached version).
supported_tradingview_built_in_variables: {{close}}  вАФ closing price of the current bar
markdown_tips: *bold text*   вАФ wrap in single asterisks
\n            вАФ new line (use inside JSON strings)

NQ_long.message:
рЯЯҐ *CONFIRMED вАФ NQ LONG*

рЯУН Entry: `{{entry}}`
рЯЫС Stop: `{{stop}}` ({{risk}} pts risk)
рЯОѓ Target: `{{target}}`
рЯУК R:R: *{{rr}}*

вП± Timeframe: {{timeframe}}
вЬЕ Daily: BULLISH | 4H: BULLISH

рЯУИ Confluence: {{confluence}}/3
рЯУЭ Notes: {{notes}}
